verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hide me now Under Your wings Cover me Within Your mighty hand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When the oceans rise and thunders roar I will soar with You above the storm Father, You are King over the flood I will be still, know You are God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Find rest my soul In Christ alone Know His power In quietness and trust
